title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Why Some Xbox Fans Are Worried About New Microsoft Gaming CEO, Asha Sharma
items.description: Xbox has a new leader in the form of Microsoft Gaming CEO Asha Sharma, who comes from an AI position and has not worked in gaming before.

items.title: ‘Paradise’ Season 2’s Rotten Tomatoes Score Solidifies As Reviews Pour In

items.title: Apple iPhone 18 Pro May See Record-Breaking Power Upgrade, Report Says
items.description: A new report says the next flagship iPhone could have an improvement to the feature users love: battery life.
